meaning: 瓦尔纳[保加利亚东北部港市]
examples: You may also consider Varna Airport.
But first there is Varna to discover.
Goranov died on 3 March of his injuries, after apparently setting himself on fire outside the mayor's office in Varna.
In 1444, Turks under Amurath II defeated Janos Hunyadi and his army of Hungarians and Poles at the battle of Varna.
